results.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.44.
results.why: This pass tightens the deck's general-purpose interaction and smooths setup for [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] at a casual power level. [[Farewell]] and [[Merciless Eviction]] add flexible reset buttons, while [[Oath of Nissa]] improves early consistency. The removed lands and off-plan planeswalker were lower-impact or awkward within the deck's color and game plan constraints.

raw.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.44.
raw.plan: This pass tightens the deck's general-purpose interaction and smooths setup for [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] at a casual power level. [[Farewell]] and [[Merciless Eviction]] add flexible reset buttons, while [[Oath of Nissa]] improves early consistency. The removed lands and off-plan planeswalker were lower-impact or awkward within the deck's color and game plan constraints.
raw.why: This pass tightens the deck's general-purpose interaction and smooths setup for [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] at a casual power level. [[Farewell]] and [[Merciless Eviction]] add flexible reset buttons, while [[Oath of Nissa]] improves early consistency. The removed lands and off-plan planeswalker were lower-impact or awkward within the deck's color and game plan constraints.

added.farewell: [[Farewell]] gives the deck a broad, flexible sweeper that can answer many board states cleanly.
added.merciless eviction: [[Merciless Eviction]] adds another exile-based board wipe that can hit the most relevant permanent type.
added.oath of nissa: [[Oath of Nissa]] helps smooth early draws by finding lands, creatures, or planeswalkers efficiently.

removed.alchemist's refuge: [[Alchemist's Refuge]] was cut because its utility was less important than cleaner overall deck function.
removed.gavony township: [[Gavony Township]] was removed as a lower-priority utility land for this broader refinement pass.
removed.nicol bolas, dragon-god: [[Nicol Bolas, Dragon-God]] was cut because it sits outside [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]'s color identity.
removed.reliquary tower: [[Reliquary Tower]] was removed as a low-impact land that does not advance the deck's main plan consistently.

warnings: Source deck lists 1 line(s) that appear outside Atraxa, Praetors' Voice's color identity (replacements may be needed).

results.summary: Budget swaps returned 2 cheaper one-for-one pairs.
results.why:
mystic remora -> curiosity: Cheap repeatable draw engine for a value-focused build.
sylvan library -> abundance: Improves draw quality and helps hit key resources consistently.

results.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.05.
results.why: This pass trims a few lower-fit or color-identity-problem cards to tighten the list around [[Lathril, Blade of the Elves]] without changing the deck’s casual game plan. It also reduces excess basics after the cleanup trim so the final build stays lean and legal. The goal was general refinement rather than a major rebuild.
